section.heading: Documented defined

content.p: In sections 56309 through 56311, the term “documented” means, with respect to a vessel, that a certificate of documentation has been issued for the vessel under chapter 121.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 115–91, div. C, title XXXV, § 3504(d), Dec. 12, 2017, 131 Stat. 1913.)
